skillsSnapshot.prompt:
The following skills provide specialized instructions for specific tasks.
Use the read tool to load a skill's file when the task matches its description.
When a skill file references a relative path, resolve it against the skill directory (parent of SKILL.md / dirname of the path) and use that absolute path in tool commands.

<available_skills>
  <skill>
    <name>coding-agent</name>
    <description>Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.</description>
    <location>~/AppData\Roaming\npm\node_modules\openclaw\skills\coding-agent\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>healthcheck</name>
    <description>Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).</description>
    <location>~/AppData\Roaming\npm\node_modules\openclaw\skills\healthcheck\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>node-connect</name>
    <description>Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.</description>
    <location>~/AppData\Roaming\npm\node_modules\openclaw\skills\node-connect\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>skill-creator</name>
    <description>Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".</description>
    <location>~/AppData\Roaming\npm\node_modules\openclaw\skills\skill-creator\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>weather</name>
    <description>Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.</description>
    <location>~/AppData\Roaming\npm\node_modules\openclaw\skills\weather\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>app-memory-anhphiai</name>
    <description>Remember and restate the confirmed basic usage flow for the AnhPhiAI app. Use when answering questions about how to use AnhPhiAI, when guiding a user through the basic workflow, or when drafting customer replies about the app's core steps.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw\workspace\skills\app-memory-anhphiai\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>conversation-logger</name>
    <description>Tự động ghi lại các cuộc trò chuyện hỗ trợ khách hàng. Kích hoạt SAU MỖI cuộc hội thoại hỗ trợ với user thường (không phải admin). Lưu Q&A vào file memory để phục vụ tra cứu và cải thiện chất lượng trả lời trong tương lai.
</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw\workspace\skills\conversation-logger\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>image-reader</name>
    <description>Đọc và phân tích hình ảnh do người dùng gửi. Sử dụng khi người dùng gửi ảnh kèm câu hỏi, yêu cầu mô tả ảnh, đọc text trong ảnh (OCR), phân tích screenshot, nhận diện lỗi từ ảnh, hoặc bất kỳ tác vụ nào liên quan đến hình ảnh. Hỗ trợ: ảnh chụp màn hình, ảnh lỗi app, ảnh giao dịch, ảnh QR code, ảnh chứa text, và ảnh thông thường.
</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw\workspace\skills\image-reader\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>interlink-support</name>
    <description>Interlink Network customer support knowledge base (bilingual EN/VI). Use when answering questions about Interlink app — mining, signup, login, ITLG tokens, games, wallet, HCS, referrals, bugs, or any user issue. Covers FAQ, bug codes (M01-M03, S01-S04, G01-G04, O01-O03), and advanced cases (Burn, Email, HCS, Wallet). Detect user language and reply in the same language.
</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw\workspace\skills\interlink-support\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>whitepaper-sync</name>
    <description>Daily sync và lưu trữ nội dung từ InterLink Whitepaper (https://whitepaper.interlinklabs.ai). Chạy tự động lúc 3:00 AM hàng ngày qua cron. Dùng để trả lời câu hỏi về token, tokenomics, technical, vision, roadmap từ whitepaper chính thức.
</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw\workspace\skills\whitepaper-sync\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
</available_skills>

The following skills provide specialized instructions for specific tasks.
Use the read tool to load a skill's file when the task matches its description.
When a skill file references a relative path, resolve it against the skill directory (parent of SKILL.md / dirname of the path) and use that absolute path in tool commands.

<available_skills>
  <skill>
    <name>coding-agent</name>
    <description>Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: app-memory-anhphiai
resolvedSkills.description: Remember and restate the confirmed basic usage flow for the AnhPhiAI app. Use when answering questions about how to use AnhPhiAI, when guiding a user through the basic workflow, or when drafting customer replies about the app's core steps.

resolvedSkills.name: conversation-logger
resolvedSkills.description: Tự động ghi lại các cuộc trò chuyện hỗ trợ khách hàng. Kích hoạt SAU MỖI cuộc hội thoại hỗ trợ với user thường (không phải admin). Lưu Q&A vào file memory để phục vụ tra cứu và cải thiện chất lượng trả lời trong tương lai.

resolvedSkills.name: image-reader
resolvedSkills.description: Đọc và phân tích hình ảnh do người dùng gửi. Sử dụng khi người dùng gửi ảnh kèm câu hỏi, yêu cầu mô tả ảnh, đọc text trong ảnh (OCR), phân tích screenshot, nhận diện lỗi từ ảnh, hoặc bất kỳ tác vụ nào liên quan đến hình ảnh. Hỗ trợ: ảnh chụp màn hình, ảnh lỗi app, ảnh giao dịch, ảnh QR code, ảnh chứa text, và ảnh thông thường.

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: app-memory-anhphiai
resolvedSkills.description: Remember and restate the confirmed basic usage flow for the AnhPhiAI app. Use when answering questions about how to use AnhPhiAI, when guiding a user through the basic workflow, or when drafting customer replies about the app's core steps.

resolvedSkills.name: conversation-logger
resolvedSkills.description: Tự động ghi lại các cuộc trò chuyện hỗ trợ khách hàng. Kích hoạt SAU MỖI cuộc hội thoại hỗ trợ với user thường (không phải admin). Lưu Q&A vào file memory để phục vụ tra cứu và cải thiện chất lượng trả lời trong tương lai.

Sử dụng khi người dùng gửi ảnh kèm câu hỏi, yêu cầu mô tả ảnh, đọc text trong ảnh (OCR), phân tích screenshot, nhận diện lỗi từ ảnh, hoặc bất kỳ tác vụ nào liên quan đến hình ảnh. Hỗ trợ: ảnh chụp màn hình, ảnh lỗi app, ảnh giao dịch, ảnh QR code, ảnh chứa text, và ảnh thông thường.

resolvedSkills.name: interlink-support
resolvedSkills.description: Interlink Network customer support knowledge base (bilingual EN/VI). Use when answering questions about Interlink app — mining, signup, login, ITLG tokens, games, wallet, HCS, referrals, bugs, or any user issue. Covers FAQ, bug codes (M01-M03, S01-S04, G01-G04, O01-O03), and advanced cases (Burn, Email, HCS, Wallet). Detect user language and reply in the same language.

resolvedSkills.name: whitepaper-sync
resolvedSkills.description: Daily sync và lưu trữ nội dung từ InterLink Whitepaper (https://whitepaper.interlinklabs.ai). Chạy tự động lúc 3:00 AM hàng ngày qua cron. Dùng để trả lời câu hỏi về token, tokenomics, technical, vision, roadmap từ whitepaper chính thức.

origin.label: Tekkaus | InterLink • MOD • OG • Ambassador (@Tekkaus) id:788519316

skillsSnapshot.prompt:
The following skills provide specialized instructions for specific tasks.
Use the read tool to load a skill's file when the task matches its description.
When a skill file references a relative path, resolve it against the skill directory (parent of SKILL.md / dirname of the path) and use that absolute path in tool commands.

<available_skills>
  <skill>
    <name>coding-agent</name>
    <description>Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.</description>
    <location>~/AppData\Roaming\npm\node_modules\openclaw\skills\coding-agent\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>healthcheck</name>
    <description>Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).</description>
    <location>~/AppData\Roaming\npm\node_modules\openclaw\skills\healthcheck\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>node-connect</name>
    <description>Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.</description>
    <location>~/AppData\Roaming\npm\node_modules\openclaw\skills\node-connect\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>skill-creator</name>
    <description>Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".</description>
    <location>~/AppData\Roaming\npm\node_modules\openclaw\skills\skill-creator\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>weather</name>
    <description>Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.</description>
    <location>~/AppData\Roaming\npm\node_modules\openclaw\skills\weather\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>app-memory-anhphiai</name>
    <description>Remember and restate the confirmed basic usage flow for the AnhPhiAI app. Use when answering questions about how to use AnhPhiAI, when guiding a user through the basic workflow, or when drafting customer replies about the app's core steps.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw\workspace\skills\app-memory-anhphiai\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>conversation-logger</name>
    <description>Tự động ghi lại các cuộc trò chuyện hỗ trợ khách hàng. Kích hoạt SAU MỖI cuộc hội thoại hỗ trợ với user thường (không phải admin). Lưu Q&A vào file memory để phục vụ tra cứu và cải thiện chất lượng trả lời trong tương lai.
</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw\workspace\skills\conversation-logger\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>image-reader</name>
    <description>Đọc và phân tích hình ảnh do người dùng gửi. Sử dụng khi người dùng gửi ảnh kèm câu hỏi, yêu cầu mô tả ảnh, đọc text trong ảnh (OCR), phân tích screenshot, nhận diện lỗi từ ảnh, hoặc bất kỳ tác vụ nào liên quan đến hình ảnh. Hỗ trợ: ảnh chụp màn hình, ảnh lỗi app, ảnh giao dịch, ảnh QR code, ảnh chứa text, và ảnh thông thường.
</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw\workspace\skills\image-reader\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>interlink-support</name>
    <description>Interlink Network customer support knowledge base (bilingual EN/VI). Use when answering questions about Interlink app — mining, signup, login, ITLG tokens, games, wallet, HCS, referrals, bugs, or any user issue. Covers FAQ, bug codes (M01-M03, S01-S04, G01-G04, O01-O03), and advanced cases (Burn, Email, HCS, Wallet). Detect user language and reply in the same language.
</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw\workspace\skills\interlink-support\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>whitepaper-sync</name>
    <description>Daily sync và lưu trữ nội dung từ InterLink Whitepaper (https://whitepaper.interlinklabs.ai). Chạy tự động lúc 3:00 AM hàng ngày qua cron. Dùng để trả lời câu hỏi về token, tokenomics, technical, vision, roadmap từ whitepaper chính thức.
</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw\workspace\skills\whitepaper-sync\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
</available_skills>

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".

resolvedSkills.name: app-memory-anhphiai
resolvedSkills.description: Remember and restate the confirmed basic usage flow for the AnhPhiAI app. Use when answering questions about how to use AnhPhiAI, when guiding a user through the basic workflow, or when drafting customer replies about the app's core steps.

resolvedSkills.name: conversation-logger
resolvedSkills.description: Tự động ghi lại các cuộc trò chuyện hỗ trợ khách hàng. Kích hoạt SAU MỖI cuộc hội thoại hỗ trợ với user thường (không phải admin). Lưu Q&A vào file memory để phục vụ tra cứu và cải thiện chất lượng trả lời trong tương lai.

resolvedSkills.name: image-reader
resolvedSkills.description: Đọc và phân tích hình ảnh do người dùng gửi. Sử dụng khi người dùng gửi ảnh kèm câu hỏi, yêu cầu mô tả ảnh, đọc text trong ảnh (OCR), phân tích screenshot, nhận diện lỗi từ ảnh, hoặc bất kỳ tác vụ nào liên quan đến hình ảnh. Hỗ trợ: ảnh chụp màn hình, ảnh lỗi app, ảnh giao dịch, ảnh QR code, ảnh chứa text, và ảnh thông thường.

resolvedSkills.name: interlink-support
resolvedSkills.description: Interlink Network customer support knowledge base (bilingual EN/VI). Use when answering questions about Interlink app — mining, signup, login, ITLG tokens, games, wallet, HCS, referrals, bugs, or any user issue. Covers FAQ, bug codes (M01-M03, S01-S04, G01-G04, O01-O03), and advanced cases (Burn, Email, HCS, Wallet). Detect user language and reply in the same language.

resolvedSkills.name: whitepaper-sync
resolvedSkills.description: Daily sync và lưu trữ nội dung từ InterLink Whitepaper (https://whitepaper.interlinklabs.ai). Chạy tự động lúc 3:00 AM hàng ngày qua cron. Dùng để trả lời câu hỏi về token, tokenomics, technical, vision, roadmap từ whitepaper chính thức.

skillsSnapshot.prompt:
The following skills provide specialized instructions for specific tasks.
Use the read tool to load a skill's file when the task matches its description.
When a skill file references a relative path, resolve it against the skill directory (parent of SKILL.md / dirname of the path) and use that absolute path in tool commands.

<available_skills>
  <skill>
    <name>coding-agent</name>
    <description>Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.</description>
    <location>~/AppData\Roaming\npm\node_modules\openclaw\skills\coding-agent\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>healthcheck</name>
    <description>Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).</description>
    <location>~/AppData\Roaming\npm\node_modules\openclaw\skills\healthcheck\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>node-connect</name>
    <description>Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.</description>
    <location>~/AppData\Roaming\npm\node_modules\openclaw\skills\node-connect\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>skill-creator</name>
    <description>Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".</description>
    <location>~/AppData\Roaming\npm\node_modules\openclaw\skills\skill-creator\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>weather</name>
    <description>Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.</description>
    <location>~/AppData\Roaming\npm\node_modules\openclaw\skills\weather\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>app-memory-anhphiai</name>
    <description>Remember and restate the confirmed basic usage flow for the AnhPhiAI app. Use when answering questions about how to use AnhPhiAI, when guiding a user through the basic workflow, or when drafting customer replies about the app's core steps.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw\workspace\skills\app-memory-anhphiai\SKILL.md</location>

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: app-memory-anhphiai
resolvedSkills.description: Remember and restate the confirmed basic usage flow for the AnhPhiAI app. Use when answering questions about how to use AnhPhiAI, when guiding a user through the basic workflow, or when drafting customer replies about the app's core steps.

resolvedSkills.name: conversation-logger
resolvedSkills.description: Tự động ghi lại các cuộc trò chuyện hỗ trợ khách hàng. Kích hoạt SAU MỖI cuộc hội thoại hỗ trợ với user thường (không phải admin). Lưu Q&A vào file memory để phục vụ tra cứu và cải thiện chất lượng trả lời trong tương lai.

resolvedSkills.name: image-reader
resolvedSkills.description: Đọc và phân tích hình ảnh do người dùng gửi. Sử dụng khi người dùng gửi ảnh kèm câu hỏi, yêu cầu mô tả ảnh, đọc text trong ảnh (OCR), phân tích screenshot, nhận diện lỗi từ ảnh, hoặc bất kỳ tác vụ nào liên quan đến hình ảnh. Hỗ trợ: ảnh chụp màn hình, ảnh lỗi app, ảnh giao dịch, ảnh QR code, ảnh chứa text, và ảnh thông thường.

resolvedSkills.name: interlink-support
resolvedSkills.description: Interlink Network customer support knowledge base (bilingual EN/VI). Use when answering questions about Interlink app — mining, signup, login, ITLG tokens, games, wallet, HCS, referrals, bugs, or any user issue. Covers FAQ, bug codes (M01-M03, S01-S04, G01-G04, O01-O03), and advanced cases (Burn, Email, HCS, Wallet). Detect user language and reply in the same language.

resolvedSkills.name: whitepaper-sync
resolvedSkills.description: Daily sync và lưu trữ nội dung từ InterLink Whitepaper (https://whitepaper.interlinklabs.ai). Chạy tự động lúc 3:00 AM hàng ngày qua cron. Dùng để trả lời câu hỏi về token, tokenomics, technical, vision, roadmap từ whitepaper chính thức.

skillsSnapshot.prompt:
The following skills provide specialized instructions for specific tasks.
Use the read tool to load a skill's file when the task matches its description.
When a skill file references a relative path, resolve it against the skill directory (parent of SKILL.md / dirname of the path) and use that absolute path in tool commands.

<available_skills>
  <skill>
    <name>coding-agent</name>
    <description>Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.</description>
    <location>~/AppData\Roaming\npm\node_modules\openclaw\skills\coding-agent\SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>healthcheck</name>
    <description>Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).</description>
    <location>~/AppData\Roaming\npm\node_modules\openclaw\skills\healthcheck\SKILL.md</location>

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.

resolvedSkills.name: healthcheck
resolvedSkills.description: Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).

resolvedSkills.name: node-connect
resolvedSkills.description: Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.

resolvedSkills.name: skill-creator
resolvedSkills.description: Create, edit, improve, or audit AgentSkills. Use when creating a new skill from scratch or when asked to improve, review, audit, tidy up, or clean up an existing skill or SKILL.md file. Also use when editing or restructuring a skill directory (moving files to references/ or scripts/, removing stale content, validating against the AgentSkills spec). Triggers on phrases like "create a skill", "author a skill", "tidy up a skill", "improve this skill", "review the skill", "clean up the skill", "audit the skill".

resolvedSkills.name: weather
resolvedSkills.description: Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.

resolvedSkills.name: app-memory-anhphiai
resolvedSkills.description: Remember and restate the confirmed basic usage flow for the AnhPhiAI app. Use when answering questions about how to use AnhPhiAI, when guiding a user through the basic workflow, or when drafting customer replies about the app's core steps.

resolvedSkills.name: conversation-logger
resolvedSkills.description: Tự động ghi lại các cuộc trò chuyện hỗ trợ khách hàng. Kích hoạt SAU MỖI cuộc hội thoại hỗ trợ với user thường (không phải admin). Lưu Q&A vào file memory để phục vụ tra cứu và cải thiện chất lượng trả lời trong tương lai.

resolvedSkills.name: image-reader
resolvedSkills.description: Đọc và phân tích hình ảnh do người dùng gửi. Sử dụng khi người dùng gửi ảnh kèm câu hỏi, yêu cầu mô tả ảnh, đọc text trong ảnh (OCR), phân tích screenshot, nhận diện lỗi từ ảnh, hoặc bất kỳ tác vụ nào liên quan đến hình ảnh. Hỗ trợ: ảnh chụp màn hình, ảnh lỗi app, ảnh giao dịch, ảnh QR code, ảnh chứa text, và ảnh thông thường.

resolvedSkills.name: interlink-support
resolvedSkills.description: Interlink Network customer support knowledge base (bilingual EN/VI). Use when answering questions about Interlink app — mining, signup, login, ITLG tokens, games, wallet, HCS, referrals, bugs, or any user issue. Covers FAQ, bug codes (M01-M03, S01-S04, G01-G04, O01-O03), and advanced cases (Burn, Email, HCS, Wallet). Detect user language and reply in the same language.

resolvedSkills.name: whitepaper-sync
resolvedSkills.description: Daily sync và lưu trữ nội dung từ InterLink Whitepaper (https://whitepaper.interlinklabs.ai). Chạy tự động lúc 3:00 AM hàng ngày qua cron. Dùng để trả lời câu hỏi về token, tokenomics, technical, vision, roadmap từ whitepaper chính thức.

resolvedSkills.name: coding-agent
resolvedSkills.description: Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.
